quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.Accent.Description: This color is that applies to selected states and buttons.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.AccentFo.Description: The foreground color that applies to any text or other elements that appear over the accent color.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.Danger.Description: The color that applies to error messages.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.DangerFo.Description: The foreground color that applies to any text or other elements that appear over the error color.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.Dimensio.Description: The color that applies to the names of fields that are identified as dimensions.
The foreground color that applies to any text or other elements that appear over the dimension color.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.Measure.Description: The color that applies to the names of fields that are identified as measures.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.MeasureF.Description: The foreground color that applies to any text or other elements that appear over the measure color.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.PrimaryB.Description: The background color that applies to visuals and other high emphasis UI.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.PrimaryF.Description: The color of text and other foreground elements that appear over the primary background regions, such as grid lines, borders, table banding, icons, and so on.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.Secondar.Description: The background color that applies to the sheet background and sheet controls.
The foreground color that applies to any sheet title, sheet control text, or UI that appears over the secondary background.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.Success.Description: The color that applies to success messages, for example the check mark for a successful download.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.SuccessF.Description: The foreground color that applies to any text or other elements that appear over the success color.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.Warning.Description: This color that applies to warning and informational messages.

quicksight.theme.uicolorpalette.WarningF.Description: The foreground color that applies to any text or other elements that appear over the warning color.
